message:
feat: Add vector similarity JOIN support and read_lance URL handling

- Add getVectorData() helper for reading vector columns from memory/fragments
- Add registerTableFloat32Vector() WASM export with vector_dim parameter
- Implement Vector Similarity JOIN path using cosine similarity
- Extract read_lance('url') patterns in JS and rewrite SQL
- Support https:// and opfs:// URLs in vault.exec()
- Handle Float32Array registration with dimension metadata
- Improve qualified column name handling (e.g., "i.url" -> "url")
